url.skill:title: Web Search Rules / 研究资料入库治理
url.skill:name: Web Search Rules / 研究资料入库治理
url.skill:summary_en: A bilingual research intake governance skill that turns web search results into controlled knowledge-base records using source trust levels, rules, staging, review queues, archive policies, cloud-upload safeguards, and audit logs.
url.skill:summary_zh: 一个中英双语研究资料入库治理 Skill，用来源可信度、规则筛选、暂存区、审核队列、归档策略、云端上传保护和审计日志，把网页搜索结果安全地转化为知识库资料。
url.skill:upgrade_note_en: This is the upgraded version of the previous Chinese and English Web Search Rules editions; going forward, both language editions will be maintained together in this single bilingual package.
url.skill:upgrade_note_zh: 这是此前中文与英文 Web Search Rules 两版的升级版；以后中英文版本会合并在这个双语包里统一维护。
url.skill:functions: Classifies web search results by trusted, allowed, review, and blocked source levels; supports whitelist/blacklist compatibility, automatic staging, review queues, confirmation-controlled archiving, cloud-upload safeguards, audit logs, topic-based rules, and platform adapters for Obsidian, IMA, Tencent Docs, Feishu Wiki, DingTalk Docs, NotebookLM, and custom knowledge bases.
url.skill:tags: web-search, knowledge-base, research, source-governance, whitelist, blacklist, audit-log, market-intelligence, bilingual, zh-cn, en

url.skill:description: Main bilingual instruction file for Web Search Rules / 研究资料入库治理.
ClawHub display card and public description.
Security and privacy guidance for research intake and knowledge-base writes.
Source trust levels, rule logic, and intake state machine.
Migration, dry-run, testing, and release guidance.
OpenAI agent configuration for this skill.
